## 4. Security

### CodeQL Alerts (3 open, high severity)

| Alert | File | Line | Rule | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| #6 | internal/config/cycle.go | 154 | go/path-injection | OPEN |
| #7 | internal/config/cycle.go | 165 | go/path-injection | OPEN |
| #8 | internal/config/cycle.go | — | go/path-injection | OPEN |

**Analysis:** All 3 alerts are **false positives**. The same pattern was previously dismissed (alerts #1, #4, #5) with the reason: "Cycle IDs are restricted to an ASCII alphanumeric, hyphen, and underscore allowlist before every filesystem path is constructed."

The code at `internal/config/cycle.go:172-182` validates cycle IDs via `validateCycleID()` which enforces `[a-zA-Z0-9_-]` only — no path traversal characters (`/`, `..`) can pass validation.

**Recommendation:** Dismiss alerts #6, #7, #8 as false positive with the same justification.

### Secret Scanning
✅ No open alerts

### Dependabot
✅ No open alerts

**Verdict:** No real security blockers. Dismiss false positives before release.

## 7. Commits Since v0.1.0 (27)

Major features:
- SwiftUI client (onboarding, board, run controls, macOS engine, demo mode, widget, intents)
- Auth middleware (Bearer token)
- Device registry + QR pairing
- TLS cert generation + HTTPS
- Network access modes (loopback|lan|relay)
- mDNS discovery
- Anthropic API runner
- SymvibeKit Swift package
- Community files (CODE_OF_CONDUCT, CONTRIBUTING, PR/issue templates)
- Dependabot config
- Test coverage improvements

---

## Gate Decision

### ⚠️ CONDITIONAL PASS

**Blockers:** None

**Required before release:**
1. Dismiss CodeQL alerts #6, #7, #8 as false positive
2. Create CHANGELOG.md

**Recommended (not blocking):**
- Enable branch protection admin enforcement
- Require 1 PR approval
- Add coverage threshold to CI

**Target version:** v0.2.0 (minor — new features, no breaking changes)
